prompt: A high-end luxury fashion advertising poster in vertical 9:16 format, featuring a tall elegant female model with her face intentionally obscured, standing in a dramatic three-quarter pose against a stormy cinematic sky at golden sunset. She has windswept auburn hair pulled back loosely with flying strands, and wears a two-tone belted trench coat split in rich burnt orange and deep black, layered over a cream ribbed turtleneck sweater, with one hand in the coat pocket. The trench has a structured collar, double-breasted buttons, and a slim black leather belt with a polished gold circular buckle. Surround the model with 6 large torn fabric panels framing the composition from the left and right edges, in orange, tan, and charcoal textile textures with visible stitching and frayed edges, as if fabric is ripping open around her. Use a warm amber, copper, and ember color palette, with glowing sparks and smoky haze near the bottom. Place dramatic volumetric clouds in the background, lit with fiery sunset highlights for an epic editorial mood. Add a centered white luxury logo and brand text over the model’s chest area: the horse-and-carriage emblem above the word HERMES in large elegant serif capitals. Make it look like a premium couture campaign, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, glossy magazine ad, strong contrast, refined fabric texture, fashion photography lighting, heroic composition, sharp focus on the outfit, cinematic atmosphere.
